seo.title: Terms and Conditions | 150%
seo.description: Read the terms and conditions governing the use of 150% services.

sections.text: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern access to and use of the services offered by 150% AI ("150%", "we" or "our"). By creating an account or using the platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
1. Description of service

150% provides an intelligent avatar platform for business communication, including conversational voice and text agents, messaging channel integrations and analytics tools. The service is offered under a subscription model with different plans.
2. Eligibility and registration
To use the service you must:

items: Be at least 18 years old or the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction
Provide truthful, complete and up-to-date registration information
Maintain the confidentiality of your account credentials
Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account

sections.text: You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
3. Acceptable use
When using the platform, you agree NOT to:

items: Use the service for illegal, fraudulent or harmful activities
Distribute content that infringes intellectual property rights
Transmit malware, spam or any malicious code
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to systems or data of other users
Reproduce, duplicate or resell parts of the service without express authorization
Use the service to train third-party artificial intelligence models

sections.text: 4. Subscription and payments

Access to certain features requires a paid subscription. Prices are available on our pricing page and may change with 30 days' prior notice. Subscriptions renew automatically unless you cancel before the end of the current period. We do not issue refunds for partial periods except as required by law.
5. Intellectual property

150% and its licensors own all intellectual property rights in the platform, software, designs, trademarks and content generated by 150%. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable and revocable license to use the service in accordance with these Terms.
You retain ownership of the content you enter into the platform. By doing so, you grant us a worldwide license to use it solely for the purpose of providing the service to you.
6. Privacy
The use of your personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, which forms an integral part of these Terms. By accepting the Terms, you also accept our Privacy Policy.
7. Disclaimer of warranties

The service is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free or meet your specific expectations. You use the service at your own risk.
8. Limitation of liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, 150% will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data or goodwill. 150%'s total liability under these Terms will not exceed the amount you have paid in the 12 months prior to the event giving rise to the claim.
9. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless 150%, its directors, employees and agents from any claims, damages, losses or expenses (including attorneys' fees) arising from your use of the service, breach of these Terms or infringement of third-party rights.
10. Termination

We may suspend or terminate your access to the service at any time and for any reason, including breach of these Terms, with or without prior notice. You may cancel your account at any time from your profile settings. After cancellation, we will retain your data for 30 days before permanently deleting it.
11. Governing law and jurisdiction

These Terms are governed by the laws of Spain. Any dispute will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Madrid, unless the consumer protection regulations of your country provide otherwise.
12. Changes to the Terms

We may modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of significant changes at least 15 days in advance by email or through a notice on the platform. Continued use of the service after the changes take effect implies acceptance of the new Terms.
13. Contact
If you have questions about these Terms, contact us at:
